PCEC-TASK-114-V94 provider scope
checks.detail: bounded GitHub issue creation candidate from self-hosting provider chain

checks.name: PCEC-TASK-114-V94 expected provider effect
checks.detail: one bounded GitHub issue creation would be attempted only after explicit operator go/no-go

checks.name: PCEC-TASK-114-V94 credential boundary
checks.detail: issues:write scope only; no secrets may be recorded in artifacts

checks.name: PCEC-TASK-114-V94 budget boundary
checks.detail: zero-dollar GitHub issue operation only; no billing-bearing provider operation

checks.name: PCEC-TASK-114-V94 rollback boundary
checks.detail: delete or close created issue if the candidate is executed and must be rolled back

checks.name: PCEC-TASK-114-V94 monitoring boundary
checks.detail: record provider response, created issue URL, and outcome evidence if executed

checks.name: PCEC-TASK-114-V94 incident boundary
checks.detail: stop and escalate on provider error, scope mismatch, unexpected side effect, or missing rollback route

checks.name: PCEC-TASK-114-V94 not-proven boundary
checks.detail: This candidate does not prove production provider execution safety, provider semantic correctness, credential safety, billing safety, actual rollback execution, or market adoption.

checks.name: PCEC-TASK-114-V94 stop conditions
checks.detail: production execution authorization requested, credential scope mismatch, rollback proof unavailable
